description: OmniBus BlockChainCore default vulnerability detection rules for Zig source

rules.description: Unchecked arithmetic in financial calculation (price/amount/balance/reward)
rules.fix_suggestion: Use @addWithOverflow / @mulWithOverflow or Zig's checked math for all financial values

rules.description: Missing bounds check on P2P message length — buffer overflow risk
rules.fix_suggestion: Validate message length against MAX_P2P_MSG_SIZE before processing

rules.description: Hardcoded seed peer addresses should be configurable
rules.fix_suggestion: Move seed peer addresses to config file (omnibus.toml) or CLI args

rules.description: Missing nonce validation in transaction — replay attack risk
rules.fix_suggestion: Verify nonce is exactly expected_nonce for sender; reject gaps and replays

rules.description: Block timestamp not validated against network median time
rules.fix_suggestion: Validate timestamp within +/- MAX_TIME_DRIFT of median of last 11 blocks

rules.description: Missing difficulty validation — could accept blocks with wrong difficulty
rules.fix_suggestion: Always recalculate expected difficulty and reject blocks that don't match

rules.description: Unbounded allocation in message handler — DoS via memory exhaustion
rules.fix_suggestion: Use bounded allocations with max size limits; use FixedBufferAllocator for P2P messages

rules.description: Missing peer connection rate limiting — DoS risk from connection flood
rules.fix_suggestion: Limit connections per IP to MAX_CONN_PER_IP; implement connection rate limiter

rules.description: Non-cryptographic PRNG used — insecure for key generation or nonces
rules.fix_suggestion: Use std.crypto.random or OS entropy source for all security-sensitive randomness

rules.description: Missing signature malleability check (high-S value) — transaction ID mutation
rules.fix_suggestion: Enforce low-S signatures (BIP-62/BIP-146): if s > N/2, set s = N - s

rules.description: Hardcoded genesis hash — ensure it matches the official genesis block
rules.fix_suggestion: Compute genesis hash at startup and verify against config; don't hardcode

rules.description: Unchecked memory copy — potential for out-of-bounds write
rules.fix_suggestion: Always verify destination buffer size >= source length before @memcpy

rules.description: Error suppressed with unreachable — will crash on unexpected input
rules.fix_suggestion: Handle errors explicitly; use catch |err| with proper error propagation

rules.description: Unsafe pointer cast — could cause alignment faults or type confusion
rules.fix_suggestion: Minimize pointer casts; use @as or std.mem.bytesAsSlice for safe conversion

rules.description: Unbounded loop without timeout — could hang indefinitely
rules.fix_suggestion: Add iteration limit or timeout check in all indefinite loops

rules.description: Function accepting anytype without comptime constraint — type confusion risk
rules.fix_suggestion: Add comptime type validation or use explicit types for public APIs

rules.description: Orphan/stale block handling may allow chain pollution DoS
rules.fix_suggestion: Limit orphan block storage; expire orphans older than MAX_ORPHAN_AGE

rules.description: Zero or null Merkle root accepted — Nomad-style bridge attack vector
rules.fix_suggestion: Reject any block or proof with zero/null Merkle root

rules.description: Block reward calculation without halving schedule check
rules.fix_suggestion: Always compute reward from halving schedule; verify coinbase <= expected_reward

rules.description: Finality checkpoint set without quorum validation — fake finality risk
rules.fix_suggestion: Require 2/3+ validator signatures before accepting a finality checkpoint
